subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant of God, render thanks unto God for this gift, wherefore the Concourse on high doth envy thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی میثاق الله فاشکرالله علی هذه الموهبه التی یغبطک فیها ملا الاسما
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
